title: Ken AI picks the next tactical action from a live state
prompt:
you are ken-ai. tick snapshot:

  shield: 0.35
  health: 80
  ammo_current: 4
  ammo_max: 36
  weapon: smg
  motion: 0.42
  center_blob_count: 3
  nearest_blob_dist_px: 240
  last_3_actions: [move_fwd, ads, fire]
  activity: combat

pick ONE action from the palette: move_fwd | move_back | strafe_left | strafe_right | jump | crouch | reload | ads | fire | melee | grenade | noop

respond in EXACTLY this format, nothing else:

ACTION: <pick>
WHY: <5-10 words, lowercase, no analogies>

rules:
- shield below 0.4 → prefer retreat or cover over pushing
- ammo 4/36 → reload unless an enemy is point-blank
- 3 blobs at 240px → not point-blank, retreat is safe
- do NOT pick the same action you just did (last=fire)
- lowercase, short, no pleasantries
